scripts.neo4j:test:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d neo4j_test
scripts.neo4j:test:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml down neo4j_test --remove-orphans
scripts.neo4j:test:wait: cross-env NEO4J_URI=neo4j://localhost:7688 NEO4J_USER=neo4j NEO4J_PASSWORD=password tsx src/scripts/check-neo4j.ts
scripts.test:integration: npm run -s neo4j:test:up && npm run -s neo4j:test:wait && cross-env NODE_ENV=test ALLOW_TEST_GRAPH_LOAD=true NEO4J_URI=neo4j://localhost:7688 NEO4J_USER=neo4j NEO4J_PASSWORD=password NEO4J_DATABASE=neo4j tsx --test tests/integration/**/*.test.ts
scripts.smoke:readiness: npm run -s neo4j:test:up && npm run -s neo4j:test:wait && cross-env NODE_ENV=test ALLOW_TEST_GRAPH_LOAD=true NEO4J_URI=neo4j://localhost:7688 NEO4J_USER=neo4j NEO4J_PASSWORD=password NEO4J_DATABASE=neo4j tsx src/scripts/load-test-graph.ts tests/fixtures/readiness-fixture.cypher && cross-env NODE_ENV=test ALLOW_TEST_GRAPH_LOAD=true NEO4J_URI=neo4j://localhost:7688 NEO4J_USER=neo4j NEO4J_PASSWORD=password NEO4J_DATABASE=neo4j tsx --test tests/integration/readiness-tools.test.ts
